title: lotus racemosus
intro: Lotus racemosus, also known as Neelambri, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus and is commonly found in wetlands and waterways of tropical regions. The plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lotus racemosus include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin disorders, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant is typically prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
